parameters.toolDescription: Busca histórico individual: pontos, ocorrências, tarefas e gamificação. Requer employee_id.
parameters.query:
=(SELECT 'Ponto' as categoria, record_date::text as data, status as acao, 'Entrada: ' || COALESCE(entry_1, '--') || ' Saída: ' || COALESCE(exit_1, '--') as detalhes
 FROM time_tracking_records WHERE employee_id = '{{ $json.body.context.employee_id }}')
UNION ALL
(SELECT 'Ocorrência' as categoria, created_at::text, type, description
 FROM occurrences WHERE employee_id = '{{ $json.body.context.employee_id }}')
UNION ALL
(SELECT 'Tarefa' as categoria, created_at::text, title, status
 FROM tasks WHERE assignee_id = '{{ $json.body.context.employee_id }}')
UNION ALL
(SELECT 'Gamificação' as categoria, updated_at::text, 'Pontuação Atual', points::text
 FROM employees WHERE id = '{{ $json.body.context.employee_id }}')
ORDER BY data DESC LIMIT 30;

parameters.toolDescription: Busca rankings gerais: quem mais falta, quem tem mais atestados e líderes de pontos.
parameters.query:
SELECT 
    e.name as colaborador, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN o.type = 'falta' THEN 1 END) as qtd_faltas,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN o.type = 'atestado' THEN 1 END) as qtd_atestados,
    MAX(e.points) as pontos_totais,
    e.department as departamento
FROM employees e
LEFT JOIN occurrences o ON e.id = o.employee_id
WHERE e.is_active = true
GROUP BY e.name, e.department, e.points
ORDER BY qtd_faltas DESC, qtd_atestados DESC, pontos_totais DESC;
